ogTitle: Hawthorndene vs Hay Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Hawthorndene vs Hay Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawthorndene, South Australia and Hay Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hay Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Hawthorndene (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawthorndene or Hay Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawthorndene has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Hay Flat scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawthorndene scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Hay Flat scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawthorndene or Hay Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hay Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
